VisaPathway
Visa Checker About

Multi-Passport Visa Checker

Hold multiple passports or a residence permit? Enter all your documents — we'll find the best way to enter any country.

Loading visa data for 199 countries...

Why This Tool Exists

Existing visa checkers only handle one passport at a time. But millions of people hold multiple passports or residence permits that grant additional travel privileges. An Indian citizen with a UAE residence permit can enter Georgia, Serbia, Turkey, and several other countries that an Indian passport alone cannot access visa-free.

VisaPathway checks all your documents simultaneously and recommends the best one to use for each destination. No more checking multiple websites.

What We Cover

  • 199 passports — every recognized country
  • 5 residence permit types — UAE, US Green Card, Schengen, UK, Canada
  • Visa-free, visa on arrival, e-visa, and visa required classifications
  • Official sources linked for every residence permit exemption

How We Ensure Accuracy

Our passport-to-country visa matrix comes from the Passport Index Dataset, an open-source project that cross-references multiple authoritative sources. Residence permit exemptions are manually compiled from official government immigration websites — every entry links to its source.

Despite our best efforts, visa requirements change frequently. Always verify with the relevant embassy or consulate before traveling. We display the last verification date on every data point.

Popular Searches

13 extra countries visa-free
